{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Skysworn training facility
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is at a [[Skysworn training facility]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
